## Type of Change
<!-- Auto-detected by CI from the diff (gpt-4o-mini). Confirm below. -->
- [ ] `feat`: New feature (MINOR bump → PyPI publish)
- [ ] `fix`: Bug fix (PATCH bump → PyPI publish)
- [ ] `refactor`: Code refactoring (PATCH bump → PyPI publish)
- [ ] `breaking`: Breaking API change (MAJOR bump → PyPI publish)
- [ ] `docs` / `test` / `chore`: No version bump, no publish

> ℹ️ The PR title is auto-generated by CI and drives the version bump.
> Correct it here if the AI misclassified the change.

## Checklist
- [ ] All CI tests pass
- [ ] No hardcoded credentials or secrets
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] PR title prefix matches the actual change type
